rule_name: India EPF — Employee Provident Fund Rates
scope: Employees and employers covered under EPF & MP Act 1952. Mandatory for establishments with 20+ employees; employees earning up to Rs 15,000/month basic wage.
source_name: Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO), Ministry of Labour and Employment
notes: Interest rate of 8.25% for FY 2026-27 announced by EPFO Central Board of Trustees. Same as FY 2024-25 and FY 2025-26 — three consecutive years of stability. Interest is calculated on monthly running balance but credited annually on 31 March. Tax-free up to Rs 2.5L annual contribution (employee share); above Rs 2.5L is taxable.

contribution_rates.notes: Employer's 12% splits: 3.67% to EPF account + 8.33% to Employee Pension Scheme (EPS). EPS 8.33% is capped on Rs 15,000 wage = Rs 1,250/month max.

tax_exemption.notes: Employee EPF contribution up to Rs 2.5L/year is tax-exempt under Section 80C (old regime). Interest on contribution above Rs 2.5L/year is taxable.

withdrawal_rules.notes: Partial withdrawal allowed for specific purposes (medical, marriage, education, home purchase) with service conditions.
